info.title: The Habit
info.subtitleSpan: Real energy instead of artificial kicks.
info.lead: The natural alternative to artificial energy drinks — no added sugar, no synthetic taurine. With «The Habit», you invest in a completely different league: a highly concentrated essence that needs no synthetic caffeine.
info.advantageBody: Our exclusive Zelt Selection delivers the rare Omega-7 fatty acid (up to 42 % concentration), 18 essential amino acids and over 190 bioactive compounds — the whole berry, cold-pressed. Vitamin C contributes to the normal function of the immune system and to the reduction of tiredness and fatigue.
info.scienceItem1: 3× 250 ml of purest, cold-pressed organic essence (Zelt Selection).
info.scienceItem2: 30 days of daily ritual — one bottle every 10 days.
info.scienceItem3: Yields over 8 litres of vitalising premium drink.
info.shippingText: Free premium shipping within Switzerland. Direct shipping from our logistics centre in Aarau.

purchase.aboLabel: Subscription 63.00 CHF/month — you save 6.– (−9 %) · cancel anytime
